symptom_vector: packet corruption causing connection timeouts and rrt_max latency spikes

expert_knowledge.root_cause_desc: checkoutservice与paymentservice之间的网络通信链路发生数据包损坏，导致rrt和rrt_max指标异常飙升，引发连接超时和握手失败
reasoning_chain: Step 1: 观察到 checkoutservice-2 的 rrt_max 指标从正常 199453 飙升至 20122078.5，变化率高达1960.7%，同时 paymentservice-0 的 rrt p99 从2127.52升至2472178.23
Step 2: 分析 checkoutservice 与 paymentservice 之间的调用链路，发现 PaymentService/Charge 操作延迟从正常12.8ms激增至24,427ms（延迟倍数1,904倍），并出现43次异常连接超时

Step 3: 检查日志发现 frontend 服务报告 'failed to charge card: could not charge the card: rpc error: code = Unavailable desc = timed out waiting for server handshake' 和 'transport: Error while dialing dial tcp 10.233.55.4:50051: i/o timeout'，确认网络连接超时问题

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Extreme spike in p99 values (e.g., from 2127.52 to 2472178.23)
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 checkoutservice 和 paymentservice 之间的 rrt 指标是否出现异常飙升，特别是p99值的变化

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Drastic increase from baseline (e.g., 199453 to 20122078.5, change rate >1900%)
critical_checks.instruction: 分析 rrt_max 指标在故障期间是否出现极端异常，重点关注变化率超过1000%的异常点

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Connection dialing errors with timeout messages
critical_checks.instruction: 在 frontend 和 checkoutservice 日志中搜索包含 'Error while dialing' 关键词的连接错误记录

critical_checks.expected_pattern: RPC context canceled errors in gRPC calls
critical_checks.instruction: 查找包含 'rpc error: code = Canceled desc = context canceled' 的日志条目，确认请求被取消的情况

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Various timeout errors (i/o timeout, handshake timeout)
critical_checks.instruction: 检查所有服务日志中的timeout相关错误，包括i/o timeout和handshake timeout

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Service unavailable errors in RPC calls
critical_checks.instruction: 搜索包含 'code = Unavailable' 的RPC错误日志，确认服务不可用状态
分析调用链数据，检查 checkoutservice 调用 paymentservice 的操作是否出现严重的延迟异常

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Abnormal patterns in network packet statistics
critical_checks.instruction: 监控 checkoutservice 和 paymentservice 相关pod的网络收发字节数和包数，检查是否存在异常模式
